options.text: Deploys Photostore with Microsoft Entra sign-in. Two things this deployment needs: (1) your account can register apps and grant admin consent in this directory (a tenant admin can), and (2) a region with Azure Container Apps capacity — if a deploy fails with a capacity error, retry in another region.

basics.name: appName
basics.label: App name
basics.toolTip: Used as a prefix for all resource names. 3-17 lowercase letters/numbers, starting with a letter.

constraints.validationMessage: 3-17 characters, lowercase letters and numbers, starting with a letter.
